questionHtml: Outline, in terms of collision theory, how a decrease in pressure would affect the rate of reaction.
markschemeHtml:
«rate of reaction decreases»
concentration/number of molecules in a given volume decreases
OR
more space between molecules  [✔]

collision rate/frequency decreases
OR
fewer collisions per second/unit time  [✔]

 

Note: Do not accept just “larger space/volume” for M1.

meta.title: Outline, in terms of collision theory, how a decrease in pressure would affect the rate of reaction.
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
